title: vitis denticulata
intro: Vitis denticulata, also known as the Chinese grapevine or Chinese wild grape, is a species of plant in the grape family native to China. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis denticulata include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Vitis denticulata include tea, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being made into powders and extracts for various health benefits.
